title: Refresh CLI surface snapshot for --layer flag addition
description: Update CLI surface drift-gate snapshot to include new --layer flag in `fab doctor --help` output. Update docs/test-seed/cli.md §1 (canonical CLI surface) to mirror new flag. This task exists because rc.15 set up cli-surface drift-gate: any --help drift fails CI. Per rc.15 plan note, this is the safe way to expand surface.

files.change: Add row for --layer flag: `--layer=team\|personal\|all` with description 'Filter cite metrics by KB layer (default all)'. Place after --client row for consistency.

Re-run snapshot regeneration: delete current snapshot entry for 'fab doctor', re-run cli-surface.test with vitest --update flag (or equivalent), commit regenerated snapshot. Manual verification: diff shows ONLY the new --layer line added, no spurious changes.

implementation: Read docs/test-seed/cli.md §1 to locate fab doctor flags table.
Add --layer row in alphabetical or logical-grouping position (alongside --client).
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test cli-surface` — expect failure with snapshot mismatch.
Re-run with snapshot update flag: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test cli-surface --update` (or vitest equivalent).
Diff regenerated snapshot vs prior — confirm ONLY --layer addition (no other surface drift).
Re-run test without --update to confirm clean pass.

reference.pattern: CLI surface drift-gate snapshot refresh (rc.15 precedent)
reference.examples: rc.15 TASK-001 established the drift-gate; rc.20 TASK-09 refreshed for --cite-coverage flag addition; rc.24 mirrors rc.20 process for --layer.

rationale.chosen_approach: Standard snapshot refresh — flag addition is documented + snapshot regenerated in same commit.
alternatives_considered: Skip snapshot update (rejected: CI will fail)
Bypass drift gate (rejected: defeats the point)
rationale.tradeoffs: Snapshot file diff noise; reviewer must inspect to confirm only the intended addition.

manual_checks: Manual diff of snapshot file to confirm only --layer added
success_metrics: test-seed cli.md §1 matches new flag set
integration: cli-surface drift-gate fab doctor --help matches snapshot

criteria: cli-surface.test.ts.snap contains '--layer' in fab doctor --help block
Snapshot diff vs prior shows ONLY --layer addition (no spurious changes)
Commit msg: 'chore(rc24): refresh CLI surface snapshot for --layer flag (TASK-11)'
